heading: Duties of Sergeant at Arms
label: 5604 Duties of Sergeant at Arms
text: It shall be the duty of the Sergeant at Arms of the House of Representatives to attend the House during its sittings, to maintain order under the direction of the Speaker, and, pending the election of a Speaker or Speaker pro tempore, under the direction of the Clerk, execute the commands of the House and all processes issued by authority thereof, directed to him by the Speaker.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 78 of this title
Amendments1996— struck out “, keep the accounts for the pay and mileage of Members and Delegates, and pay them as provided by law” after “directed to him by the Speaker”.Pub. L. 104–186

Transfer of FunctionsEffective , functions of House of Representatives Office of Emergency Planning, Preparedness, and Operations transferred to Sergeant at Arms of the House of Representatives, see , set out as a note under former .Feb. 1, 2010section 105 of title I of div. G of Pub. L. 112–74section 130i of this title
